title: lantana strigosa
intro: Lantana strigosa, a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana strigosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Lantana strigosa, such as teas and infusions, are traditionally used in folk medicine to address various health concerns, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
